title: Harvie Heights STR
definition: Harvie Heights short-term product can reach about +$600/month when occupancy holds — a workable but not padded margin.
reality_check: Distance to core Canmore affects rate

faq.a: Often on nightly rate; some models still clear costs with lower purchase basis.
Price/value, ski-season length, and listing quality — not just views.
